chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَمُوتُ وَ لَا تَتْرُكُ إِلَّا زَوْجَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – The woman dies and she does not leave except for her husband

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/184)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/184)
text: امْرَأَةٍ تُوُفِّيَتْ وَ لَمْ يُعْلَمْ لَهَا أَحَدٌ وَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ قَالَ الْمِيرَاثُ كُلُّهُ لِزَوْجِهَا .

عَنْهُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ يَحْيَى الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ الْحُرِّ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَدَعَا بِالْجَامِعَةِ فَنَظَرْنَا فِيهَا فَإِذَا فِيهَا امْرَأَةٌ هَلَكَتْ وَ تَرَكَتْ زَوْجَهَا لَا وَارِثَ لَهَا غَيْرُهُ لَهُ الْمَالُ كُلُّهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran and Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, altogether from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws regarding the woman who passed away and no one was known to be for her, and for her was a husband. Heasws said: ‘The inheritance, all of it, is for her husband’[360].
From him, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Yahya al Halby, from Ayoub Bin Al Hurr, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Abdullahasws, so heasws called for Al-Jami’a (Book of Aliasws). So we looked into it, and therein was, a woman who died and left her husband, not having an inheritor for her other than him, for him was the wealth, all of it’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu Najran and Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus all from ‘Asem ibn Humayd from Muhammad ibn Qays who has narrated the following: “About the case of a woman who dies leaving behind her husband and no other known heirs, abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, The entire legacy belongs to the husband.’”
